name: story-continuity-guard
description: A local-first Codex plugin for auditing story revisions, fact sources, and continuity metadata.

interface.shortDescription: Audit story facts, revisions, and continuity.
interface.longDescription: A local-first continuity workflow for AI-assisted stories. It checks revision metadata, claim labels, source references, and immutable-history conventions before narrative drift reaches production.
interface.defaultPrompt: Audit this story project for revision and continuity risks without modifying its source files.
